displayProperties.name: Crystalline Transistor
displayProperties.description:
Final blows from Kinetic weapons create an explosion in the element of your equipped Super that deals damage and applies a matching elemental effect:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Weakens targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.
Elemental final blows temporarily increase the explosion's size. Precision final blows always maximum the explosion's size.

displayProperties.name: Information
displayProperties.description:
• Traveler's Blessings have a chance to be awarded from most chests in the Traveler's Pale Heart. This includes Cyst chests, Lost Sector chests, Overthrow Level 2 and Level 3 encounter chests, Pathfinder Field Assignment chests, and Triage chests.

• Each daily reset, a Lost Sector, Cyst, or Overthrow grant a guaranteed Traveler's Blessing upon completion. Look on the Traveler's Pale Heart map to find out which activity grants a guaranteed blessing!

• Traveler's Blessings awarded from the above sources will always be chosen from the list of expired Traveler's Blessings.

• Once acquired, Traveler's Blessings can be used for 27 hours before expiring.

displayProperties.name: Aphotic Lamellar Boots
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Heretical Entrance
displayProperties.description: Modifications for your ship's transmat systems, so you'll always arrive in style.
